title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A tutorial on building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and workflow automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video demonstrates how Softr's no-code platform can reduce expensive iterative AI prompting by generating database structures and automations automatically from a single prompt.
